inputs.text: Extreme close-up of eyes and lips only, reflected in a rain-speckled glass pane, Korean idol woman with rose gold wet-look slicked back hair catching blue hour twilight. Baby face with subtle aegyo-sal under-eye charm, cool edgy expression, lips slightly parted in defiance. Shot on 50mm lens, standard portrait framing. She wears a vintage floral dress with delicate lace collar barely visible at frame edge. Cherry blossom petals drift past the glass surface creating soft pink bokeh. Blue hour ambient light casts cool indigo tones across her flawless porcelain skin while warm golden highlights trace her cheekbones. Styled editorial makeup with smoky gradient lids and glass-skin finish. Vivid chromatic palette, fashion-forward aesthetic, ultra high detail.
lowres, deformed, blurry, watermark, ugly, low quality
